prompt: A candid documentary-style photo of a high school computer lab classroom filled with exactly 10 students seated at rows of bulky off-white CRT desktop computers, viewed from the back-left corner of the room at a slight wide angle. The scene should feel like an early-2000s snapshot taken on a consumer digital camera with direct flash, soft grain, slightly warm indoor fluorescent lighting, and a timestamp in the bottom-right corner reading 02 18 04. In the foreground left, a student in a navy track jacket with white sleeve stripes points at a CRT monitor; in the center foreground, another student with short spiky hair wears an oversized gray sweatshirt and sits facing away from the camera; on the right foreground, a blonde student with a ponytail wears a light blue long-sleeve top with dark horizontal arm stripes and types at a keyboard; far right, another student with curly dark hair sits at a workstation. Several other students occupy the middle and back rows, all facing their screens. The monitors prominently display the ChatGPT interface, with the visible heading reading ChatGPT and simple prompt text beneath it. The room has beige walls, drop ceiling tiles, and multiple motivational classroom posters: exactly 4 readable posters on the back wall saying YOU CAN DO HARD THINGS, "BE KIND ONLINE", "THINK BEFORE YOU CLICK", and a larger poster titled "KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS" with a list beneath it. Include bulletin boards, a classroom door at the back, rolling office chairs, white keyboards and mice, and a backpack on the floor near the right foreground desk. Faces should be partially obscured or softly anonymized, preserving the look of a real classroom photo while keeping the focus on the students using ChatGPT in an old computer lab.
